features.name: self_referencing_conditional_nonblocking_assignment
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking procedural assignment where a register is assigned a conditional (ternary) expression that references the same register on the false branch
features.snippet: always_ff @(posedge clk) reg <= cond ? foo : reg;

features.name: four_value_logic_conditional_vs_if_equivalence
features.description: Code should include a conditional operator form and an equivalent if-statement form that demonstrate non-equivalence under x-value conditions in 4-value logic

features.name: procedural_block_with_conditional_self_reference
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block containing a conditional operator assignment with self-referencing register that is sensitive to 4-value logic semantics
